title: App monetization implementation support
excerpt:
Hi all, 
We’re struggling in implementing monetization for our very first app, and need very basic guidance on how to implement monetization in our code. 
Can someone help us please? 
Thank you!

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We’re struggling in implementing monetization for our very first app, and need very basic guidance on how to implement monetization in our code.

Can someone help us please?
Thank you!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Dana and welcome to the community!

Someone from our team will contact you via email soon

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @Matias.Monday
We haven’t got any guidance yet, we were asked to fill out the monetization form again, which we did, but no one contacted us back yet.
Will you please assist us?
Thank you again!

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dana
I’m trying to check the status of your form, can you help me understand what the app the form was for?
